title: Spicy Flaky Mung Sprout Bowl
description: A spicy and flaky brunch-mood Filipino dish featuring mung bean sprouts, served warm or cold as a snack, jain-friendly option.
instructions: Soak the mung bean sprouts in water for at least an hour.
In a bowl, mix mung bean sprouts with fish sauce and lemon juice. Let it sit for about 10 minutes to soften them slightly.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic cloves, cumin powder, turmeric powder, salt, and red chili paste to the pan and stir well until fragrant but not burnt.
Stir in the soaked mung bean sprouts, green chilies, and sesame seeds. Cook for about 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve immediately as a snack or cool on a plate.
For added flavor, garnish with extra chopped green chilies and fresh cilantro leaves.
